title: Delphinastrum urceolatum
taxonomy: Delphinastrum urceolatum belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a genus of flowering plants in the tribe Senecioneae. Delphinastrum urceolatum is native to South Africa and is known for its unique, urn-shaped capitula. The classification of Delphinastrum urceolatum places it within the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. Further classification includes its order Asterales and class Magnoliopsida.
